items.title: Trilateral cooperation agreement on SMR deployment
items.blurb: The USA, Japan and South Korea have signed a memorandum of cooperation to support trilateral cooperation on accelerating small modular reactor deployments in third countries, with an initial focus on the Indo-Pacific…

items.title: Four Micro Reactors Hit Criticality Milestones Crossing DOE’s Finish Line on July 4th
items.blurb: Four Micro Reactors Meet Criticality Milestones On 07/04/26 as part of the U.S. Department of Energy Reactor Pilot Program, Aalo Atomics’ advanced reactor design, Aalo-X, was the fourth firm to successfully complete a…

items.title: Deep Fission receives prototype reactor canister
items.blurb: California-based startup Deep Fission, which aims to place small modular reactors in boreholes a mile underground, has announced the delivery of its prototype reactor canister for its pilot project to the Parsons site…

items.title: Fuel loading completed at Mochovce 4
items.blurb: Slovenské elektrárne has announced that all 349 nuclear fuel assemblies have been successfully loaded into Mochovce 4. The process took five days, and was completed on Friday 3 July.

items.title: Google Invests in $468-Million Funding Round for German Fusion Group
items.blurb: Proxima Fusion, a Munich, Germany-based group that is considered among the leading European companies working on fusion energy, said it completed a €411 million ($468 million) funding round. Proxima on July 7 said…
